## Empathize class

Component containing the empathize. It has a required slot to define its content and two props to define when to open and close it: eventsToOpenEmpathize and eventsToCloseEmpathize.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class Empathize extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [animation](./x-components.empathize.animation.md) |  | Vue | Animation component that will be used to animate the empathize. |
|  [eventsToCloseEmpathize](./x-components.empathize.eventstocloseempathize.md) |  | [XEvent](./x-components.xevent.md)<!-- -->\[\] | Array of [xEvents](./x-components.xevent.md) to close the empathize. |
|  [eventsToOpenEmpathize](./x-components.empathize.eventstoopenempathize.md) |  | [XEvent](./x-components.xevent.md)<!-- -->\[\] | Array of [xEvents](./x-components.xevent.md) to open the empathize. |
